chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3279 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.01.2019 Mr. Abdul Hameed Bajwa, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G., Addl..A.G and Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G alongwith P.I Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, ASI Ramzan on behalf of S.H.O P.S B- Section and Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad..... Mr. Muhammad Aleem Arain, Advocate, has filed his power on behalf of respondent No.9. Whereas, learned Additional Advocate General Sindh has filed the reply of SSP which shows the list of cases registered against the petitioner. All the parties after arguing at some length have agreed to the disposal of this petition in the terms whereby the police officials are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and to provide protection to the petitioner as per law. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
